entries.d:
What you type when you're so bored you've typed [qwertyuiopasdfghjklzxcvbnm], [mnbvcxzlkjhgfdsapoiuytrewq], [qazwsxedcrfvtgbyhnujmikolp], [plokimjunhybgtvfrcdexwzaq], `1234567890-=qwertyuiop\\asdfghjkl;'zxcvbnm,./, and everything else I searched today, and thought, "I know! Surely "qpwoeirutyalskdjfhgzmxncbv" couldn't turn up any results! How creative I am!"\r
It is what you get when you press the next key on either edge of a QWERTY keyboard until you get to the middle and repeat for each row.
> Ugh, I'm so bored and I've tried every QWERTY combo. Oh, wait, I'll try qpwoeirutyalskdjfhgzmxncbv!
